full_text:
Sheng Dao 盛道
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sheng Dao (盛道)was born in Jianwei. Joined a failed revolt against Liu Zhang. His wife sacrificed herself to save him from execution. Sheng Dao was affiliated with Zhao Wei.
